Class Song

java.lang.Object
Song
public class Song extends Object
Represents a single song with metadata and file path. Fields: title, artist, duration (in seconds), and absolute file path.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Two songs are considered equal if they have the same title and artist. (Duration and file path are ignored for equality check.)
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object

      public String toString()
      Return a human-readable string with all song details.
